  super();

  SubImplementor.$clinit();
  let $instance = new SubImplementor();
  $instance.$ctor__interfaces_Main_SubImplementor__interfaces_Main__void($outer_this);

 }
 /** @nodts */
 $ctor__interfaces_Main_SubImplementor__interfaces_Main__void(/** !Main */ $outer_this) {
  this.$outer_this__interfaces_Main_SubImplementor = $outer_this;
  this.$ctor__interfaces_Main_AbstractImplementor__interfaces_Main__void($outer_this);
